creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
I updated the distinfo in the original port before
using the porttools submit options so the diff for
the distinfo file is missing - sorry. I know you are
capable of generating it yourself, but just to make
the patch/pr correct I have added it below.

Regards,
Hans Nordhaug
